headline: Rocket Lab and Redwire Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after the U.S. and Iran signaled progress toward a peace agreement, lifting both commercial and defense aerospace names.

headline: GE426 Engine Award Gives General Electric A New Defense Growth Angle
summary: GE Aerospace, part of General Electric (NYSE:GE), has been awarded a contract for its new GE426 engine to support the U.S. Air Force’s next generation Autonomous Collaborative Platform program. The contract focuses on advancing design and development work for propulsion in future autonomous combat aircraft. This award reinforces GE’s role in U.S. defense propulsion and digital development for autonomous military systems, separate from its commercial aerospace operations. For investors...
